---
title: "bioRxiv preprint (Quarto)"
shorttitle: "My Preprint"
leadauthor: "Doe"
author:
  - name: John Doe
    corresponding: true
    affiliations:
      - Department of Something, Somewhere University, Some City, Some Country
    email: john.doe@example.org
  - name: Jane Doe
    affiliations:
      - Department of Another Thing, Another University, Another City, Another Country
abstract: |
  This document demonstrates the bioRxiv Typst-based PDF Quarto format.
  Replace this text with your abstract.
keywords:
  - template
  - demo
correspondence-email: john.doe@example.org
bibliography: bibliography.bib
format:
  biorxiv-typst: default
---

# Introduction {.unnumbered}

Introduce the topic, motivation, and goals of the study. Cite relevant prior
work [@Gustafsson2016; @CameronTrivedi2013].

# Methods {.unnumbered}

Describe your experimental or computational methods.

# Results {.unnumbered}

Present findings. Reference figures (e.g. @fig-placeholder) and supplementary
material as needed.

![Placeholder figure with a long example caption to show justification
setting.](figures/Figure_1.png){#fig-placeholder width="80%"}

# Discussion {.unnumbered}

Interpret results in the context of existing literature and describe
limitations.

# Acknowledgements {.unnumbered}

We thank colleagues for helpful discussions. Funding was provided by \[agency\].

# Supplementary Information {.unnumbered}

## Supplementary Methods

Additional methodological details go here.
